name: Atrium 3D Mind Palace MVP
description: Verify that the live URL opens, showing the 3D scene, floating HUD panel, language/theme settings modals, and holographic search navigator.

planSteps.description: Verify the floating control panel containing HUD actions is visible at the side of the screen
Click the Settings button on the floating control panel
Verify the settings modal with 'Home & Room Customization' or 'Ev & Oda Özelleştirme' heading is visible as an overlay
Click the UI Theme option for Light Theme
Verify the application UI updates color scheme and stays readable
Click the Close button on the settings modal
Click the Holographic Control Panel button on the floating control panel
Verify the Holographic Control Panel window showing search input is visible
